description.en: StartMessaging Refund Policy. Understand refund eligibility, process, and timelines for our messaging services.
description.pt: Política de Reembolso do StartMessaging. Entenda a elegibilidade, o processo e os prazos de reembolso dos nossos serviços de mensagens.
description.es: Política de Reembolso de StartMessaging. Conozca la elegibilidad, el proceso y los plazos de reembolso de nuestros servicios de mensajería.
description.id: Kebijakan Pengembalian StartMessaging. Pahami kelayakan, proses, dan jadwal pengembalian dana untuk layanan perpesanan kami.
description.ar: سياسة استرداد StartMessaging. تعرّف على أهلية الاسترداد والعملية والجداول الزمنية لخدمات المراسلة لدينا.
description.tr: StartMessaging İade Politikası. Mesajlaşma hizmetlerimiz için iade uygunluğunu, sürecini ve zaman çizelgelerini anlayın.

title.pt: Política de Reembolso e Saldo de Carteira
title.es: Política de Reembolso y Saldo de Cartera

subtitle.en: Transparent terms regarding refund eligibility, unused prepaid wallet credits, active subscription cancellations, billing dispute resolutions, and payment operator conditions. Last updated: June 1, 2026.
subtitle.pt: Termos transparentes sobre a elegibilidade de reembolso, créditos de carteira pré-paga não utilizados, cancelamentos de assinatura ativos, resoluções de disputas de cobrança e condições de operadoras de pagamento. Última atualização: 1 de junho de 2026.
subtitle.es: Términos transparentes con respecto a la elegibilidad de reembolso, créditos de billetera prepagos no utilizados, cancelaciones de suscripción activas, resoluciones de disputas de facturación y condiciones del operador de pago. Última actualización: 1 de junio de 2026.
subtitle.id: Ketentuan transparan mengenai kelayakan pengembalian dana, kredit dompet prabayar yang tidak terpakai, pembatalan langganan aktif, penyelesaian perselisihan penagihan, dan kondisi operator pembayaran. Terakhir diperbarui: 1 Juni 2026.
subtitle.ar: شروط تفصيلية تتعلق بأهلية الاسترداد، وأرصدة المحفظة مسبقة الدفع غير المستخدمة، وإلغاء الاشتراكات النشطة، وتسوية نزاعات الفواتير، وشروط مشغلي الدفع. آخر تحديث: 1 يونيو 2026.
subtitle.tr: İade uygunluğu, kullanılmayan ön ödemeli cüzdan kredileri, aktif abonelik iptalleri, fatura itiraz çözümleri ve ödeme sağlayıcısı koşullarına ilişkin şeffaf kurallarımız. Son güncelleme: 1 Haziran 2026.

content.en:
1. General Policy

StartMessaging operates on a monthly subscription and pay-as-you-go message usage billing model. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued and the process for requesting one for subscription fees and message volume credits.

2. Subscription Refunds

2.1 Monthly Subscriptions

Monthly subscription fees (Premium and Enterprise plans) are non-refundable once the billing period has started. If you cancel mid-cycle, you retain access to the Service until the end of the current billing period, and no prorated refunds will be issued.

2.2 Annual Subscriptions

If you purchased an annual subscription, you may request a prorated refund within 14 days of purchase, provided you have not used more than 10% of your included monthly message allocation. After 14 days, annual subscription fees are fully non-refundable.

3. Message Volume Credits

Pay-as-you-go message volume charges are deducted based on actual sends. If you believe there has been a billing error or system discrepancy, you may request a correction within 14 days. We do not issue refunds for messages successfully delivered to or processed by partner messaging networks.

4. Eligible Refund Scenarios

We may issue refunds or service credits in the following situations:

  • Service outage: If our API experiences sustained downtime (more than 4 consecutive hours) that prevents message transmission, we will credit your account proportionally for the affected period.
  • Billing errors: If you were charged incorrectly due to a system error, we will issue a full refund of the overcharged amount.
  • Duplicate charges: If you were charged twice for the same service, we will refund the duplicate charge immediately.

5. Non-Eligible Scenarios

Refunds will NOT be issued for:

  • Messages successfully delivered to recipients (regardless of whether the recipient read or responded).
  • Change of mind or business decision to stop using the Service.
  • Unused free-tier messages (they expire monthly and do not carry over).
  • Account suspension or termination due to violation of the Terms of Use.
  • Third-party charges (Meta's WhatsApp conversation charges are non-refundable through us — contact Meta directly).

6. How to Request a Refund

To request a refund, send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com with:

  • Your registered email address and company name
  • The transaction or invoice number
  • The reason for your refund request
  • Any supporting documentation (screenshots, error logs)

We will review your request and respond within 5 business days. Approved refunds are processed within 10 business days via the original payment method.

7. Dispute Resolution

If you disagree with our refund decision, you may escalate the matter by responding to our decision email with additional information. We will conduct a final review within 10 business days. If the dispute remains unresolved, it shall be governed by the dispute resolution provisions in our Terms of Use.

8. Contact

For refund inquiries: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348
content.in:
1. General Policy

StartMessaging operates on a prepaid wallet model for SMS and OTP services in India, and a subscription/usage model for WhatsApp. This policy outlines when refunds may be issued for prepaid wallet top-ups and how billing disputes are resolved.

2. Prepaid Wallet Balance

Wallet credits purchased for SMS and OTP APIs do not expire and remain active for eligible message sends. Wallet balance is pre-funded in INR by the user via Razorpay.

3. Refund Requests for Wallet Top-ups

If you wish to request a refund of your unused prepaid wallet balance, you must contact us within fourteen (14) days of the relevant top-up transaction. Please send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com with your registered email, payment date, and payment transaction reference from Razorpay.

We review each request fairly. Approved refunds for unused balance are typically processed within seven (7) business days to the original payment method where possible. OTPs and SMS messages already sent and successfully processed are non-refundable, as telecom and network delivery costs are incurred at send time.

4. Eligible Refund Scenarios

We may issue refunds or wallet credits in the following situations:

  • Billing errors: If you were charged incorrectly due to a system calculation error, we will credit your wallet or issue a refund for the overcharged amount.
  • Duplicate transactions: If your payment method was charged twice for the same wallet top-up, we will refund the duplicate transaction.
  • Outage compensation: If our API experiences sustained downtime (more than 4 consecutive hours) that prevents message delivery, we will credit your wallet proportionally for the affected period.

5. Non-Eligible Scenarios

Refunds will NOT be issued for:

  • Messages that are accepted and processed through our API (regardless of delivery status on the end-user device, as telecom costs are incurred at send time).
  • Change of mind or decision to discontinue using the service after 14 days from top-up.
  • Accounts suspended or terminated due to violation of TRAI guidelines, DLT rules, or our Terms of Use (e.g., sending spam or phishing messages).

6. Disputes and Support

For delivery issues, failed sends, or billing questions, reach out to our support team. We aim to resolve billing disputes promptly and will provide clarification on charges tied to your API usage and message logs where applicable.

7. Contact

For refund inquiries: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348 | WhatsApp: +91 6376383348
content.pt:
1. Política Geral

A StartMessaging opera com um modelo de faturamento de assinatura mensal e uso de mensagens sob demanda. Esta Política de Reembolso descreve quando reembolsos podem ser emitidos e o processo para solicitá-los para taxas de assinatura e créditos de volume de mensagens.

2. Reembolsos de Assinatura

2.1 Assinaturas Mensais

As taxas de assinatura mensal (planos Premium e Enterprise) não são reembolsáveis após o início do período de faturamento. Se você cancelar no meio do ciclo, manterá o acesso ao Serviço até o final do período de faturamento atual, e nenhum reembolso proporcional será emitido.

2.2 Assinaturas Anuais

Se você adquiriu uma assinatura anual, pode solicitar um reembolso proporcional em até 14 dias após a compra, desde que não tenha utilizado mais de 10% da sua alocação mensal de mensagens incluída. Após 14 dias, as taxas de assinatura anual são totalmente não reembolsáveis.

3. Créditos de Volume de Mensagens

As cobranças de volume de mensagens sob demanda são deduzidas com base nos envios reais. Se você acredita que houve um erro de faturamento ou discrepância do sistema, pode solicitar uma correção em até 14 dias. Não emitimos reembolsos para mensagens entregues com sucesso ou processadas por redes de mensagens parceiras.

4. Cenários Elegíveis para Reembolso

Podemos emitir reembolsos ou créditos de serviço nas seguintes situações:

  • Interrupção do serviço: Se nossa API sofrer uma indisponibilidade prolongada (mais de 4 horas consecutivas) que impeça a transmissão de mensagens, creditaremos sua conta proporcionalmente pelo período afetado.
  • Erros de faturamento: Se você foi cobrado incorretamente devido a um erro do sistema, emitiremos um reembolso integral do valor cobrado a mais.
  • Cobranças duplicadas: Se você foi cobrado duas vezes pelo mesmo serviço, reembolsaremos a cobrança duplicada imediatamente.

5. Cenários Não Elegíveis

Reembolsos NÃO serão emitidos para:

  • Mensagens entregues com sucesso aos destinatários (independentemente de o destinatário ter lido ou respondido).
  • Mudança de opinião ou decisão comercial de parar de usar o Serviço.
  • Mensagens do plano gratuito não utilizadas (expiram mensalmente e não são cumulativas).
  • Suspensão ou encerramento de conta devido à violação dos Termos de Uso.
  • Cobranças de terceiros (as cobranças de conversação do WhatsApp da Meta não são reembolsáveis através de nós — entre em contato diretamente com a Meta).

6. Como Solicitar um Reembolso

Para solicitar um reembolso, envie um e-mail para startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com com:

  • Seu endereço de e-mail registrado e nome da empresa
  • O número da transação ou fatura
  • O motivo da sua solicitação de reembolso
  • Qualquer documentação de apoio (capturas de tela, logs de erros)

Analisaremos sua solicitação e responderemos em até 5 dias úteis. Reembolsos aprovados são processados em até 10 dias úteis pelo método de pagamento original.

7. Resolução de Disputas

Se você discordar da nossa decisão de reembolso, pode escalar o assunto respondendo ao nosso e-mail de decisão com informações adicionais. Conduziremos uma revisão final em até 10 dias úteis. Se a disputa permanecer não resolvida, será regida pelas disposições de resolução de disputas dos nossos Termos de Uso.

8. Contato

Para consultas sobre reembolso: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telefone: +91 6376383348
content.es:
1. Política General

StartMessaging opera con un modelo de facturación de suscripción mensual y uso de mensajes bajo demanda. Esta Política de Reembolso describe cuándo se pueden emitir reembolsos y el proceso para solicitarlos para tarifas de suscripción y créditos de volumen de mensajes.

2. Reembolsos de Suscripción

2.1 Suscripciones Mensuales

Las tarifas de suscripción mensual (planes Premium y Enterprise) no son reembolsables una vez iniciado el período de facturación. Si cancela a mitad del ciclo, conservará el acceso al Servicio hasta el final del período de facturación actual, y no se emitirán reembolsos prorrateados.

2.2 Suscripciones Anuales

Si adquirió una suscripción anual, puede solicitar un reembolso prorrateado dentro de los 14 días posteriores a la compra, siempre que no haya utilizado más del 10% de su asignación mensual de mensajes incluida. Después de 14 días, las tarifas de suscripción anual no son reembolsables.

3. Créditos de Volumen de Mensajes

Los cargos de volumen de mensajes bajo demanda se deducen en función de los envíos reales. Si cree que ha habido un error de facturación o discrepancia del sistema, puede solicitar una corrección dentro de los 14 días. No emitimos reembolsos por mensajes entregados exitosamente o procesados por redes de mensajería asociadas.

4. Escenarios Elegibles para Reembolso

Podemos emitir reembolsos o créditos de servicio en las siguientes situaciones:

  • Interrupción del servicio: Si nuestra API experimenta un tiempo de inactividad sostenido (más de 4 horas consecutivas) que impida la transmisión de mensajes, acreditaremos su cuenta proporcionalmente por el período afectado.
  • Errores de facturación: Si se le cobró incorrectamente debido a un error del sistema, emitiremos un reembolso completo del monto cobrado de más.
  • Cargos duplicados: Si se le cobró dos veces por el mismo servicio, reembolsaremos el cargo duplicado de inmediato.

5. Escenarios No Elegibles

Los reembolsos NO se emitirán por:

  • Mensajes entregados exitosamente a los destinatarios (independientemente de si el destinatario leyó o respondió).
  • Cambio de opinión o decisión comercial de dejar de usar el Servicio.
  • Mensajes del plan gratuito no utilizados (expiran mensualmente y no se acumulan).
  • Suspensión o terminación de cuenta por violación de los Términos de Uso.
  • Cargos de terceros (los cargos de conversación de WhatsApp de Meta no son reembolsables a través de nosotros — contacte directamente a Meta).

6. Cómo Solicitar un Reembolso

Para solicitar un reembolso, envíe un correo electrónico a startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com con:

  • Su dirección de correo electrónico registrada y nombre de la empresa
  • El número de transacción o factura
  • El motivo de su solicitud de reembolso
  • Cualquier documentación de respaldo (capturas de pantalla, registros de errores)

Revisaremos su solicitud y responderemos dentro de los 5 días hábiles. Los reembolsos aprobados se procesan dentro de los 10 días hábiles a través del método de pago original.

7. Resolución de Disputas

Si no está de acuerdo con nuestra decisión de reembolso, puede escalar el asunto respondiendo a nuestro correo electrónico de decisión con información adicional. Realizaremos una revisión final dentro de los 10 días hábiles. Si la disputa no se resuelve, se regirá por las disposiciones de resolución de disputas de nuestros Términos de Uso.

8. Contacto

Para consultas sobre reembolsos: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Teléfono: +91 6376383348
content.id:
1. Kebijakan Umum

StartMessaging beroperasi dengan model penagihan langganan bulanan dan penggunaan pesan bayar-per-penggunaan. Kebijakan Pengembalian ini menguraikan kapan pengembalian dana dapat diberikan dan proses untuk memintanya untuk biaya langganan dan kredit volume pesan.

2. Pengembalian Langganan

2.1 Langganan Bulanan

Biaya langganan bulanan (paket Premium dan Enterprise) tidak dapat dikembalikan setelah periode penagihan dimulai. Jika Anda membatalkan di tengah siklus, Anda tetap memiliki akses ke Layanan hingga akhir periode penagihan saat ini, dan tidak akan diberikan pengembalian dana prorata.

2.2 Langganan Tahunan

Jika Anda membeli langganan tahunan, Anda dapat meminta pengembalian dana prorata dalam 14 hari setelah pembelian, dengan syarat Anda belum menggunakan lebih dari 10% alokasi pesan bulanan yang disertakan. Setelah 14 hari, biaya langganan tahunan sepenuhnya tidak dapat dikembalikan.

3. Kredit Volume Pesan

Biaya volume pesan bayar-per-penggunaan dipotong berdasarkan pengiriman aktual. Jika Anda yakin telah terjadi kesalahan penagihan atau perbedaan sistem, Anda dapat meminta koreksi dalam 14 hari. Kami tidak memberikan pengembalian dana untuk pesan yang berhasil dikirim ke atau diproses oleh jaringan perpesanan mitra.

4. Skenario yang Memenuhi Syarat Pengembalian

Kami dapat memberikan pengembalian dana atau kredit layanan dalam situasi berikut:

  • Gangguan layanan: Jika API kami mengalami waktu henti berkelanjutan (lebih dari 4 jam berturut-turut) yang mencegah transmisi pesan, kami akan mengkreditkan akun Anda secara proporsional untuk periode yang terpengaruh.
  • Kesalahan penagihan: Jika Anda dikenakan biaya yang salah karena kesalahan sistem, kami akan mengeluarkan pengembalian dana penuh dari jumlah yang dikenakan berlebih.
  • Biaya duplikat: Jika Anda dikenakan biaya dua kali untuk layanan yang sama, kami akan segera mengembalikan biaya duplikat tersebut.

5. Skenario yang Tidak Memenuhi Syarat

Pengembalian dana TIDAK akan diberikan untuk:

  • Pesan yang berhasil dikirim ke penerima (terlepas dari apakah penerima membaca atau merespons).
  • Perubahan pikiran atau keputusan bisnis untuk berhenti menggunakan Layanan.
  • Pesan paket gratis yang tidak digunakan (kadaluarsa setiap bulan dan tidak dapat diakumulasi).
  • Penangguhan atau penghentian akun karena pelanggaran Ketentuan Penggunaan.
  • Biaya pihak ketiga (biaya percakapan WhatsApp Meta tidak dapat dikembalikan melalui kami — hubungi Meta secara langsung).

6. Cara Meminta Pengembalian Dana

Untuk meminta pengembalian dana, kirim email ke startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com dengan:

  • Alamat email terdaftar dan nama perusahaan Anda
  • Nomor transaksi atau faktur
  • Alasan permintaan pengembalian dana Anda
  • Dokumentasi pendukung apa pun (tangkapan layar, log kesalahan)

Kami akan meninjau permintaan Anda dan merespons dalam 5 hari kerja. Pengembalian dana yang disetujui diproses dalam 10 hari kerja melalui metode pembayaran asli.

7. Penyelesaian Sengketa

Jika Anda tidak setuju dengan keputusan pengembalian dana kami, Anda dapat meningkatkan masalah tersebut dengan merespons email keputusan kami dengan informasi tambahan. Kami akan melakukan tinjauan akhir dalam 10 hari kerja. Jika sengketa tetap tidak terselesaikan, akan diatur oleh ketentuan penyelesaian sengketa dalam Ketentuan Penggunaan kami.

8. Kontak

Untuk pertanyaan pengembalian dana: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telepon: +91 6376383348
content.ar:
1. السياسة العامة

تعمل StartMessaging بنموذج فوترة يعتمد على الاشتراك الشهري واستخدام الرسائل حسب الاستهلاك. توضح سياسة الاسترداد هذه متى يمكن إصدار المبالغ المستردة وعملية طلبها لرسوم الاشتراك وأرصدة حجم الرسائل.

2. استرداد الاشتراكات

2.1 الاشتراكات الشهرية

رسوم الاشتراك الشهري (خطط بريميوم والمؤسسات) غير قابلة للاسترداد بمجرد بدء فترة الفوترة. إذا قمت بالإلغاء في منتصف الدورة، فستحتفظ بإمكانية الوصول إلى الخدمة حتى نهاية فترة الفوترة الحالية، ولن يتم إصدار أي استردادات تناسبية.

2.2 الاشتراكات السنوية

إذا اشتريت اشتراكاً سنوياً، يمكنك طلب استرداد تناسبي في غضون 14 يوماً من الشراء، شريطة ألا تكون قد استخدمت أكثر من 10% من حصة الرسائل الشهرية المضمنة. بعد 14 يوماً، تكون رسوم الاشتراك السنوي غير قابلة للاسترداد بالكامل.

3. أرصدة حجم الرسائل

يتم خصم رسوم حجم الرسائل حسب الاستهلاك بناءً على عمليات الإرسال الفعلية. إذا كنت تعتقد أنه كان هناك خطأ في الفوترة أو تناقض في النظام، يمكنك طلب تصحيح في غضون 14 يوماً. لا نصدر استردادات للرسائل التي تم تسليمها بنجاح أو معالجتها بواسطة شبكات المراسلة الشريكة.

4. سيناريوهات الاسترداد المؤهلة

قد نصدر استردادات أو أرصدة خدمة في الحالات التالية:

  • انقطاع الخدمة: إذا تعرضت واجهة برمجة التطبيقات الخاصة بنا لتوقف مستمر (أكثر من 4 ساعات متتالية) يمنع نقل الرسائل، فسنقوم بإضافة رصيد إلى حسابك بشكل تناسبي عن الفترة المتأثرة.
  • أخطاء الفوترة: إذا تم تحصيل رسوم منك بشكل غير صحيح بسبب خطأ في النظام، فسنصدر استرداداً كاملاً للمبلغ المحصل بالزيادة.
  • الرسوم المكررة: إذا تم تحصيل رسوم منك مرتين لنفس الخدمة، فسنسترد الرسوم المكررة فوراً.

5. السيناريوهات غير المؤهلة

لن يتم إصدار استردادات في الحالات التالية:

  • الرسائل التي تم تسليمها بنجاح إلى المستلمين (بغض النظر عما إذا كان المستلم قد قرأها أو رد عليها).
  • تغيير الرأي أو قرار تجاري بالتوقف عن استخدام الخدمة.
  • رسائل الخطة المجانية غير المستخدمة (تنتهي صلاحيتها شهرياً ولا تُرحل).
  • تعليق أو إنهاء الحساب بسبب انتهاك شروط الاستخدام.
  • رسوم الأطراف الثالثة (رسوم محادثات واتساب من Meta غير قابلة للاسترداد من خلالنا — اتصل بـ Meta مباشرة).

6. كيفية طلب استرداد

لطلب استرداد، أرسل بريداً إلكترونياً إلى startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com مع:

  • عنوان بريدك الإلكتروني المسجل واسم الشركة
  • رقم المعاملة أو الفاتورة
  • سبب طلب الاسترداد
  • أي وثائق داعمة (لقطات شاشة، سجلات أخطاء)

سنراجع طلبك ونرد في غضون 5 أيام عمل. تتم معالجة المبالغ المستردة المعتمدة في غضون 10 أيام عمل عبر طريقة الدفع الأصلية.

7. حل النزاعات

إذا كنت لا توافق على قرار الاسترداد الخاص بنا، يمكنك تصعيد الأمر بالرد على بريدنا الإلكتروني مع معلومات إضافية. سنجري مراجعة نهائية في غضون 10 أيام عمل. إذا لم يتم حل النزاع، فسيخضع لأحكام حل النزاعات في شروط الاستخدام الخاصة بنا.

8. اتصل بنا

لاستفسارات الاسترداد: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | الهاتف: +91 6376383348
content.tr:
1. Genel Politika

StartMessaging, aylık abonelik ve kullandıkça öde mesaj hacmi faturalandırma modeliyle çalışmaktadır. Bu İade Politikası, abonelik ücretleri ve mesaj hacmi kredileri için geri ödemelerin ne zaman yapılabileceğini ve talep sürecini açıklar.

2. Abonelik İadeleri

2.1 Aylık Abonelikler

Aylık abonelik ücretleri (Premium ve Kurumsal planlar) faturalandırma dönemi başladıktan sonra iade edilemez. Dönem ortasında iptal ederseniz, mevcut faturalandırma döneminin sonuna kadar Hizmete erişiminiz devam eder ve orantılı iade yapılmaz.

2.2 Yıllık Abonelikler

Yıllık abonelik satın aldıysanız, dahil edilen aylık mesaj kotanızın %10'undan fazlasını kullanmamış olmanız koşuluyla, satın alma tarihinden itibaren 14 gün içinde orantılı iade talep edebilirsiniz. 14 günden sonra yıllık abonelik ücretleri tamamen iade edilemez.

3. Mesaj Hacmi Kredileri

Kullandıkça öde mesaj hacmi ücretleri gerçek gönderimlere göre düşülür. Bir faturalandırma hatası veya sistem tutarsızlığı olduğuna inanıyorsanız, 14 gün içinde düzeltme talep edebilirsiniz. Başarıyla teslim edilen veya ortak mesajlaşma ağları tarafından işlenen mesajlar için iade yapmıyoruz.

4. İade İçin Uygun Senaryolar

Aşağıdaki durumlarda iade veya hizmet kredisi verebiliriz:

  • Hizmet kesintisi: API'miz mesaj iletimini engelleyen sürekli bir kesinti yaşarsa (4 saatten fazla art arda), etkilenen dönem için hesabınıza orantılı olarak kredi ekleriz.
  • Faturalandırma hataları: Sistem hatası nedeniyle yanlış ücretlendirildiyseniz, fazla tahsil edilen tutarın tamamını iade ederiz.
  • Mükerrer ücretler: Aynı hizmet için iki kez ücretlendirildiyseniz, mükerrer ücreti derhal iade ederiz.

5. Uygun Olmayan Senaryolar

Aşağıdaki durumlar için iade YAPILMAZ:

  • Alıcılara başarıyla teslim edilen mesajlar (alıcının okuyup okumadığına veya yanıt verip vermediğine bakılmaksızın).
  • Fikir değişikliği veya Hizmeti kullanmayı bırakma kararı.
  • Kullanılmayan ücretsiz plan mesajları (aylık olarak sona erer ve devretmez).
  • Kullanım Şartlarının ihlali nedeniyle hesap askıya alma veya sonlandırma.
  • Üçüncü taraf ücretleri (Meta'nın WhatsApp konuşma ücretleri bizim aracılığımızla iade edilemez — doğrudan Meta ile iletişime geçin).

6. İade Nasıl Talep Edilir

İade talep etmek için startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com adresine aşağıdaki bilgilerle bir e-posta gönderin:

  • Kayıtlı e-posta adresiniz ve şirket adınız
  • İşlem veya fatura numarası
  • İade talebinizin nedeni
  • Destekleyici belgeler (ekran görüntüleri, hata kayıtları)

Talebinizi inceleyeceğiz ve 5 iş günü içinde yanıt vereceğiz. Onaylanan iadeler, orijinal ödeme yöntemi aracılığıyla 10 iş günü içinde işlenir.

7. Uyuşmazlık Çözümü

İade kararımıza katılmıyorsanız, karar e-postamıza ek bilgilerle yanıt vererek konuyu yükseltebilirsiniz. 10 iş günü içinde son bir inceleme yapacağız. Uyuşmazlık çözümsüz kalırsa, Kullanım Şartlarımızdaki uyuşmazlık çözümü hükümleri geçerli olacaktır.

8. İletişim

İade sorularınız için: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telefon: +91 6376383348
content.ng:
1. General Policy

StartMessaging operates on a monthly subscription and pay-as-you-go message usage billing model. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued and the process for requesting one for subscription fees and message volume credits.

2. Subscription Refunds

2.1 Monthly Subscriptions

Monthly subscription fees (Premium and Enterprise plans) are non-refundable once the billing period has started. If you cancel mid-cycle, you retain access to the Service until the end of the current billing period, and no prorated refunds will be issued.

2.2 Annual Subscriptions

If you purchased an annual subscription, you may request a prorated refund within 14 days of purchase, provided you have not used more than 10% of your included monthly message allocation. After 14 days, annual subscription fees are fully non-refundable.

3. Message Volume Credits

Pay-as-you-go message volume charges are deducted based on actual sends. If you believe there has been a billing error or system discrepancy, you may request a correction within 14 days. We do not issue refunds for messages successfully delivered to or processed by partner messaging networks.

4. Eligible Refund Scenarios

We may issue refunds or service credits in the following situations:

  • Service outage: If our API experiences sustained downtime (more than 4 consecutive hours) that prevents message transmission, we will credit your account proportionally for the affected period.
  • Billing errors: If you were charged incorrectly due to a system error, we will issue a full refund of the overcharged amount.
  • Duplicate charges: If you were charged twice for the same service, we will refund the duplicate charge immediately.

5. Non-Eligible Scenarios

Refunds will NOT be issued for:

  • Messages successfully delivered to recipients (regardless of whether the recipient read or responded).
  • Change of mind or business decision to stop using the Service.
  • Unused free-tier messages (they expire monthly and do not carry over).
  • Account suspension or termination due to violation of the Terms of Use or the Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA) 2023.
  • Third-party charges (Meta's WhatsApp conversation charges are non-refundable through us — contact Meta directly).

6. How to Request a Refund

To request a refund, send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com with:

  • Your registered email address and company name
  • The transaction or invoice number
  • The reason for your refund request
  • Any supporting documentation (screenshots, error logs)

We will review your request and respond within 5 business days. Approved refunds are processed within 10 business days via the original payment method.

7. Consumer Protection

In accordance with Nigerian consumer protection regulations and the Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Act (FCCPA) 2018, we are committed to fair and transparent billing practices. If you believe your rights as a consumer have been violated, you may escalate your complaint to the Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Commission (FCCPC).

8. Dispute Resolution

If you disagree with our refund decision, you may escalate the matter by responding to our decision email with additional information. We will conduct a final review within 10 business days. If the dispute remains unresolved, it shall be governed by the dispute resolution provisions in our Terms of Use.

9. Contact

For refund inquiries: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348
